<!-- Required fields are marked with *. Please do not remove any section headings. -->

## Short, descriptive title *
<!-- Provide a short identifier (e.g., 001-example). -->


## Status *
<!-- Mark the current status with an [x]. -->
- [ ] Open
- [ ] In progress
- [ ] Blocked
- [ ] Resolved
- [ ] Cancelled

## Priority *
<!-- Mark the severity level with an [x]. -->
- [ ] High
- [ ] Moderate
- [ ] Low

## Description *
<!-- Describe the observed incorrect behavior and expected behavior. -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What needs to be present before this issue is resolved. -->

## Additional information
<!-- Optional: any other context, links, related issues, or environment details. -->
